ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status of the passenger (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1 = 1st, 2 = 2nd, 3 = 3rd) */,
  "lname" TEXT /* Last name of the passenger */,
  "fname" TEXT /* First name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the passenger */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the passenger (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "cabin_assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cabin assignment */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (C = Cherbourg, Q = Queenstown, S = Southampton) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_cabin_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("cabin_assignment_id") REFERENCES cabin_assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ships" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ship */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "ship_type" TEXT /* Type of the ship (e.g., liner, steamship) */,
  "builder" TEXT /* Builder of the ship */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the ship was launched */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the ship */,
  "beam" REAL /* Beam (width) of the ship */,
  "draft" REAL /* Draft (depth) of the ship */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Displacement (weight) of the ship */,
  "total_capacity" INTEGER /* Total passenger capacity of the ship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyages" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship that took the voyage */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the captain of the voyage */,
  "voyage_date" TEXT /* Date of the voyage */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the voyage in days */,
  "origin_port" TEXT /* Port of origin */,
  "destination_port" TEXT /* Destination port */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the voyage */,
  "voyage_status" TEXT /* Status of the voyage (e.g., completed, disaster) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyages_origin_port FOREIGN KEY ("origin_port") REFERENCES ports ("port_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyages_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES captains ("captain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyages_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyages_destination_port FOREIGN KEY ("destination_port") REFERENCES ports ("port_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the port is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the port */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the port */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Number of family members traveling together */,
  "primary_contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary contact person in the family */,
  "relationship_details" TEXT /* Details of relationships within the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_primary_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_contact_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin assignment */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger assigned to the cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number assigned to the passenger */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of the cabin (e.g., single, double) */,
  "cabin_deck" TEXT /* Deck where the cabin is located */,
  "cabin_status" TEXT /* Status of the cabin (e.g., occupied, vacant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabin_assignments_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Account creation timestamp */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, historian, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "captains" (
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each captain */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the captain */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the captain */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the captain */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("captain_id")
)
